retry_reason: Put releases a reference unconditionally; retrying would cause a double-put and potential use-after-free.
contract_summary: Release wrapper: decrements the reference count of a task_struct via put_task_struct_rcu_user. The caller must not use the task_struct pointer after this call unless it holds another valid reference. No return value to check; the operation is unconditional and irreversible. This function is intended for use within BPF programs to safely drop a reference obtained from a prior get operation.

judge.reason: Function solely calls put_task_struct_rcu_user to decrement the refcount; no other logic.
